name: Carousel
summary: A flexible, touch-enabled carousel component powered by Embla Carousel for displaying sequential content with smooth scrolling, responsive breakpoints, and customizable navigation.
detailedDescription: The Carousel component provides a robust, production-ready solution for displaying sequential content in a horizontally scrolling format. Built on the lightweight Embla Carousel library, this component offers excellent performance and flexibility without bloated dependencies. The carousel supports various content types including images, cards, testimonials, product showcases, and media galleries. Touch-enabled swipe gestures work flawlessly on mobile devices while mouse drag and keyboard navigation provide desktop accessibility. Responsive breakpoints allow different slide counts and layouts at various screen sizes, ensuring optimal presentation across devices. Navigation options include arrow buttons, pagination dots, thumbnail strips, or custom controls. The component supports auto-scroll with configurable intervals, loop mode for infinite cycling, and variable slide widths for mixed content. Performance optimizations include lazy loading for images and efficient DOM management. Perfect for image galleries, product carousels, testimonial sliders, featured content sections, or any context requiring sequential content presentation with professional polish and reliable behavior.
purpose: Display sequential content in horizontally scrolling format
Provide touch-friendly carousel experience for mobile and desktop
Support various content types from images to cards to testimonials
Enable responsive layouts with different slide configurations per breakpoint
Deliver reliable, performant carousel functionality with Embla Carousel engine
behavior: Enables horizontal scrolling through content slides with smooth motion
Supports touch swipe gestures on mobile and drag on desktop
Provides keyboard navigation with arrow keys for accessibility
Offers multiple navigation options including arrows, dots, and thumbnails
Optionally auto-scrolls at configurable intervals with pause controls
Supports loop mode for infinite cycling and variable slide widths
Implements responsive breakpoints for different layouts per screen size
visualCharacteristics: Clean, professional carousel appearance with smooth transitions
Touch-friendly interface with visible drag/swipe affordances
Configurable navigation elements matching design preferences
Responsive layouts adapting to available screen space
Polished, production-ready aesthetic suitable for any context
Accessible design with clear focus states and keyboard support
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
